channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Johnson shrugs off late interception, throws winning TD as No. 18 Kansas St beats Colorado 31-28
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Avery Johnson rebounded from throwing a late interception by finding Jayce Brown for a 50-yard touchdown with 2:14 remaining as No. 18 Kansas State escaped with a 31-28 win over Colorado on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Beck passes for 459 yards and 3 TDs as No. 5 Georgia holds off Van Buren, Mississippi State 41-31
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Carson Beck didn't panic when No. 5 Georgia found second-half resistance from heavy underdog Mississippi State. Beck passed for a career-high 459 yards and three touchdowns and Georgia withstood Mississippi State's second-half comeback bid for a 41-31 win Saturday.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ronaldo scores again in Nations League win for perfect Portugal. Spain finds replacement for Rodri
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his record-extending 133rd international goal to keep Portugal perfect in the Nations League with a 3-1 win over Poland on Saturday, and Spain struck late to edge Denmark 1-0.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kalen DeBoer reacts after Alabama narrowly avoids second straight SEC upset: 'Proud of these guys'
item.description: Despite entering Saturday's game as the overwhelming favorite, Alabama needed very second on the clock to secure a narrow win over South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tim Walz appearance prompts protests and silent treatment at high school football game: 'getting desperate'
item.description: Tim Walz appeared at Mankato West High School on Friday for a football game and was met with protests and a lukewarm reception from the crowd.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ole Miss responds to allegations of their players faking injuries ahead of big game against LSU
item.description: The Ole Miss Rebel's released a statement on Friday regarding the questions surrounding players faking injuries to slow an opposing team's momentum.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carpenter delivers pinch-hit RBI single for Tigers in Game 5, limping to first with hamstring injury
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kerry Carpenter delivered again for the Tigers. Slowed by a hamstring injury, Carpenter hit a pinch-hit RBI single in the fifth inning Saturday to give Detroit a 1-0 lead over the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 of the AL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Former Dodgers pitcher Trevor Bauer sues accuser, says she broke settlement terms
item.description: Trevor Bauer, the former Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher and Cy Young Award winner whose career was upended by sexual assault allegations is reportedly suing his accuser for violating their settlement agreement. According to a TMZ report on Friday, the 33-year-old L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Kevin Yu birdies 18th twice and wins Sanderson Farms in playoff for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Kevin Yu made a 15-foot birdie on the 18th hole for a 5-under 67, and he birdied it again from 6 feet in a playoff to beat Beau Hossler and win the Sanderson Farms Championship on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies get run over by Boise State, 62-30
item.description: BOISE (ABC4 Sports) - Ashton Jeanty ran for 186 yards and three touchdowns on 13 first-half carries, while former American Fork High School quarterback Maddux Madsen passed for 256 yards and three TDs and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
